requirement_topic.en: Electrical Safety — IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2 Type-Test Evidence for PV Inverters
requirement_topic.zh: 电气安全——光伏逆变器IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2型式试验证据
requirement_topic.zht: 電氣安全——光伏逆變器IEC 62109-1 / IEC 62109-2型式試驗證據

summary.en: For Solomon Islands PV projects, inverter electrical safety should be documented against the project-specified IEC or AS/NZS-derived route. IEC 62109-1 and IEC 62109-2 are the normal international safety standards for PV power converters and inverters. Because national standards visibility is limited, exporters should confirm the exact SISO, utility, donor, owner, and electrical inspector requirements for the project, and should expect IEC 62109 type-test certificates or reports for the specific inverter family.
summary.zh: 对于所罗门群岛光伏项目，逆变器电气安全应按项目指定的IEC或源自AS/NZS的路径形成文件。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏功率变换器和逆变器的通常国际安全标准。由于国家标准可见性有限，出口商应确认具体项目的SISO、公用事业、援助方、业主和电气检查要求，并应预期需要覆盖具体逆变器系列的IEC 62109型式试验证书或报告。
summary.zht: 對於索羅門群島光伏項目，逆變器電氣安全應按項目指定的IEC或源自AS/NZS的路徑形成文件。IEC 62109-1和IEC 62109-2是光伏功率轉換器和逆變器的通常國際安全標準。由於國家標準可見性有限，出口商應確認具體項目的SISO、公用事業、援助方、業主和電氣檢查要求，並應預期需要覆蓋具體逆變器系列的IEC 62109型式試驗證書或報告。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62109-1 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 1: General requirements
IEC 62109-2 — Safety of power converters for use in photovoltaic power systems — Part 2: Particular requirements for inverters
SISO, Solomon Power / SIEA, project-owner, donor, or AS/NZS-derived electrical safety requirements where specified

summary.en: China-side safety evidence for PV inverters commonly relies on GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, domestic type testing, and voluntary certification. These China domestic documents can support technical understanding but are not automatically accepted as IEC 62109-1/-2 safety evidence for Solomon Islands projects, especially where the owner, utility, or donor procurement specification asks for IEC reports.
summary.zh: 中国侧光伏逆变器安全证据通常依赖GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、国内型式试验和自愿认证。这些中国国内文件可支持技术理解，但不会自动被接受为所罗门群岛项目的IEC 62109-1/-2安全证据，特别是在业主、公用事业或援助方采购规格要求IEC报告时。
summary.zht: 中國側光伏逆變器安全證據通常依賴GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004、國內型式試驗和自願認證。這些中國國內文件可支持技術理解，但不會自動被接受為索羅門群島項目的IEC 62109-1/-2安全證據，特別是在業主、公用事業或援助方採購規格要求IEC報告時。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese GB/T or NB/T safety files do not automatically satisfy an IEC 62109 requirement in Solomon Islands. Exporters should obtain IEC 62109-1/-2 type-test reports or certificates for the specific model or family, confirm whether the laboratory and certificate body are acceptable to the owner or utility, and document any tropical-environment constraints such as enclosure rating, condensation control, corrosion protection, surge protection, and derating.
gap.zh: 差距：中国GB/T或NB/T安全文件不会自动满足所罗门群岛项目中的IEC 62109要求。出口商应取得覆盖具体型号或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式试验报告或证书，确认实验室和发证机构是否被业主或公用事业接受，并记录外壳等级、冷凝控制、防腐蚀、浪涌保护和降额等热带环境限制。
gap.zht: 差距：中國GB/T或NB/T安全文件不會自動滿足索羅門群島項目中的IEC 62109要求。出口商應取得覆蓋具體型號或系列的IEC 62109-1/-2型式試驗報告或證書，確認實驗室和發證機構是否被業主或公用事業接受，並記錄外殼等級、冷凝控制、防腐蝕、突波保護和降額等熱帶環境限制。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific; mandatory in practice where Solomon Power / SIEA, SISO, the project owner, donor procurement documents, or electrical inspectors require IEC 62109 or AS/NZS-derived safety evidence
mandatory_status.cn: Voluntary or domestic-market evidence under China GB/T and NB/T routes; not automatically accepted as Solomon Islands IEC safety evidence

source.publisher: Solomon Islands Ministry of Commerce, Industry, Labour and Immigration / standards administration context

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Build the Solomon Islands safety file around IEC 62109-1/-2 unless the project authority specifies a different accepted route. China GB/T 37408-2021 or NB/T 32004 evidence is useful background but not automatic IEC safety acceptance. Confirm SISO, Solomon Power / SIEA, owner, and donor requirements before testing or shipping.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 除非项目主管方指定其他可接受路径，应以IEC 62109-1/-2构建所罗门群岛安全文件。中国GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004证据可作为背景材料，但不自动构成IEC安全接受。在测试或出货前，请确认SISO、Solomon Power / SIEA、业主和援助方要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 除非項目主管方指定其他可接受路徑，應以IEC 62109-1/-2構建索羅門群島安全文件。中國GB/T 37408-2021或NB/T 32004證據可作為背景材料，但不自動構成IEC安全接受。在測試或出貨前，請確認SISO、Solomon Power / SIEA、業主和援助方要求。
